en.extract:
The citrine white-eye (Zosterops semperi), or Caroline Islands white-eye, is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is found in Palau and the Federated States of Micronesia.

The '''citrine white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops semperi'''''), or '''Caroline Islands white-eye''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is found in [[Palau]] and the [[Federated States of Micronesia]].
